# believe_ticket_sales (Data Source)

Ticket sales with 300 records for practicing pagination, filtering, and financial data

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "believe_ticket_sales" "example_ticket_sales" {
  coupon_code = "coupon_code"
  currency = "currency"
  match_id = "match_id"
  purchase_method = "online"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `coupon_code` (String) Filter by coupon code (use 'none' for sales without coupons)
- `currency` (String) Filter by currency (GBP, USD, EUR)
- `match_id` (String) Filter by match ID
- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `purchase_method` (String) Filter by purchase method
Available values: "online", "box_office", "will_call", "phone".

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `buyer_email` (String) Email of the ticket buyer
- `buyer_name` (String) Name of the ticket buyer
- `coupon_code` (String) Coupon code applied, if any
- `currency` (String) Currency code (GBP, USD, or EUR)
- `discount` (String) Discount amount applied from coupon
- `id` (String) Unique identifier
- `match_id` (String) ID of the match
- `purchase_method` (String) How the ticket was purchased
Available values: "online", "box_office", "will_call", "phone".
- `quantity` (Number) Number of tickets purchased
- `subtotal` (String) Subtotal before discount and tax (unit_price * quantity)
- `tax` (String) Tax amount (20% UK VAT on discounted subtotal)
- `total` (String) Final total (subtotal - discount + tax)
- `unit_price` (String) Price per ticket (decimal string)
